name: 14q11_2_TRA_TRD_reference
description: T-cell receptor alpha/delta (TRA/TRD) locus on chr14q11.2, ~1 Mb spanning ~70 TRAV/TRDV variable, 5 TRDD diversity, 4 TRDJ, the TRDC constant, 61 TRAJ joining, and TRAC constant gene segments. The TRD locus is embedded within the TRA locus and is excised during alpha-chain rearrangement. The locus is somatically rearranged in every T cell and shows heavy paralog content among V-genes. Full locus details documented in /difficult_regions/TRA_TRD_locus_chr14.json; this entry serves as an SD-tier cross-reference.

architecture.internal_structure: TRAV/TRDV cluster proximal, TRD core (TRDD-TRDJ-TRDC) embedded inside, TRAJ cluster distal, TRAC constant at the distal end.
